rationale: Builds on the current soft quant-aware ramp but keeps its training-time snaps on the proven mean-offset path. Only the terminal pre-save snap and final int8 serialization switch to a selective per-row midpoint choice for projection weights, aiming to capture the tiny export-time gain seen in midpoint variants without perturbing the endgame optimization dynamics that produced the current best run. I also removed the now-unused quant-aware LR helper to keep the script lean under the code-plus-artifact cap.
title: Terminal Projection Midpoint Quantizer
